homepage.featuresTitle: What makes shopping sarees with us special?
homepage.featuresSubtitle: From handpicked fabrics to doorstep delivery, we take care of everything so you can simply enjoy the experience of finding your perfect saree.

features.title: Pure Fabrics Only
features.description: We source only 100% genuine mulberry silks, cottons, and fine linens.

features.title: Artisanal Weaves
features.description: Each item supports legacy weaving families across Varanasi and Bengal.

features.title: Perfect Tailoring
features.description: Order matching pre-stitched blouses custom tailored to your measurements.

homepage.faqSubtitle: At Boutiique Vastraa, we believe that finding the perfect saree should be a delightful and effortless experience. Here are answers to some of the most common questions our customers ask.

faqs.question: Are your sarees authentic handloom?
faqs.answer: Yes! Every saree in our handloom collection comes with the official Silk Mark or Handloom Mark certification, sourced directly from weavers.

faqs.question: Do you customize blouse designs?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We offer custom tailoring services for blouses and petticoats. You can select your measurements on the product detail page.

faqs.question: What is your return policy?
faqs.answer: We offer a hassle-free 7-day return policy on all unworn items with tags intact, except for custom tailored items.
